action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline IC=0.0435 confirmed. Pipeline solid. Analysis: LightGBM with current params only ran ~24 iters before early stopping — likely too aggressive learning rate or noisy validation. The Qlib official LightGBM recipe for Alpha158 CSI300 typically achieves IC~0.05+. Let me improve: (1) lower learning rate, more rounds; (2) add label normalization (CSRankNorm or CSZScoreNorm) which often helps; (3) try ensembling multiple seeds. Decision: Retrain with better hyperparameters using Alpha158 with proper label processors. Use the standard Alpha158 with CSZScoreNorm label normalization. Then ensemble multiple seeds.
